title: Powtiy #6319
definition:
Poti-pherah = "he whom the Ra gave"

 1) an Egyptian, priest of On, father of Asenath, the wife whom
    Pharaoh gave to Joseph
nasbUsage:

 1) an Egyptian, priest of On, father of Asenath, the wife whom
    Pharaoh gave to Joseph
